hero.headline: Unlock platinum perks and a shot to win up to $300K
hero.subheadline: Smart Energy Pays gives you instant access to premium benefits, plus one chance to win monthly payouts of up to $5,000 for 5 years.

benefits.headline: It all starts with real value
benefits.subheadline: Your Smart Energy Pays Platinum account delivers tangible advantages from day one — win or not.
benefits.card1Desc: Unlock the complete Smart Energy Pay platform and all its integrated services from day one.
benefits.card2Desc: Position yourself at the intersection of sustainable energy and modern financial infrastructure.
benefits.card3Desc: Access up to 25% off new BMW and Mercedes vehicles through our exclusive partnership program.
benefits.card4Desc: This isn't a quick flip. It's a premium ecosystem designed for compounding advantages over time.

prizes.headline: One game. Real prizes. No catch.
prizes.subheadline: A single participation-based draw with life-changing rewards.

howItWorks.headline: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your Smart Energy Pays account in minutes
howItWorks.step2Desc: Each $1,000 swapped into SEP earns you one entry ticket
howItWorks.step3Desc: Winners are drawn transparently via live stream
howItWorks.step4Desc: Win or not, your platinum benefits stay yours forever
howItWorks.disclaimer: Each $1,000 = one additional entry · Max one prize per person

comparison.headline: What This Is vs. What This Isn't

scarcity.headline: The window is closing
scarcity.subheadline: This is a one-time participation opportunity. Once the deadline passes, no new entries will be accepted.
scarcity.noGuarantee: Next access round is not guaranteed

faq.headline: What people usually ask before joining
faq.q1: Do I need to be a new client?
faq.a1: No. Existing and new clients are both welcome to participate.
faq.q2: How many tickets can I get?
faq.a2: As many as you want. Every $1,000 swapped into $SEP earns you one entry ticket.
faq.q3: Do I need a specific subscription?
faq.a3: No. All subscription tiers include full platinum benefits access.
faq.a4: Up to $5,000/month for 5 years ($300,000 total), plus exclusive ecosystem perks like vehicle discounts and full platform access.

finalCta.headline: The window closes April 30, 2026
finalCta.subheadline: After this date, no new entries will be accepted. This is a one-time opportunity.
finalCta.trustReminder: Join thousands already securing their platinum access
